Mid-range handset gets chip, storage and MagSafe upgrades to offer more essential iOS features for less
 The cheapest new iPhone has been upgraded for this year with a faster chip, double the storage, automatic portraits and MagSafe, providing even more of the core Apple smartphone experience for less.The iPhone 17e is an upgraded version of the mid-range “e” line launched last year with the first iPhone 16e and is the latest member of the iPhone 17 family. summary: Vercel has open-sourced json-render, a framework that enables AI models to create structured user interfaces from natural language prompts. Community feedback includes both support and skepticism, highlighting its differences from existing standards. By Daniel Curtis
